title: Introduction to Computer Science
description: A comprehensive introduction to computer science covering algorithms, data structures, and computational thinking.

title: Web Development Fundamentals
description: Learn HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to build modern responsive websites from scratch.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Deep dive into data structures, sorting algorithms, and problem-solving techniques.

title: Database Management Systems
description: Introduction to relational databases, SQL queries, and database design principles.

title: Mobile App Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native and modern frameworks.

title: Artificial Intelligence
description: Explore AI concepts including machine learning, neural networks, and natural language processing.
